## Source: amazon-inspector (15f6d0a640d7d4323f1ef52969a6a259b9b6e3bacc2bf65f514cd618a00945a9)

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (9507cb60c86468a7c12b26e35e0501ebd750e48a8e7decbc5996460e1c229e95)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'ty-web-session' @ 3.0.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
